EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.name} failed to send an email from the address {subject.id} to {datafield8} recipients due to the policies: {datafield6}
The user {subject.name} failed to send an email from the address {subject.id} to {datafield8} recipients
The user {subject.name} sent an email from the address {subject.id} to the address {object.value}
The user {subject.name} sent an email from the address {subject.id} to the address {object.value} in violation of the policies: {datafield6}

The user {subject.name} sent an email from the address {subject.id} to {datafield8} recipients
